name: HMS Florizel (J 404)
events: 28 Jun 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMS Florizel (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J. Martin-Smith, RNR). (1)
4 Jul 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMS Florizel (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J. Martin-Smith, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
